task: Validated direction inference signal chain and confirmed autonomous session gate logic for preventing token waste on low-confidence or empty-context sessions
discussion_summary: Session focused on understanding when askr should NOT start an autonomous session to avoid wasting tokens. User asked what qualifies as 'nothing' (zero direction inference) and how to ensure the system doesn't spin up a session without actionable context. This led to validation of the three-signal direction inference system (dirty files, blockers.md, handover next_actions) and confirmation that the direction_confirm HITL gate at confidence < 0.70 is the correct mechanism to prevent empty-context autonomous sessions.

accomplishments.what: Validated Signal 1 (uncommitted files) correctly fires and produces high-confidence direction
Validated Signal 3 (handover next_actions) correctly reads and prioritizes previous session's planned work
Confirmed direction_confirm HITL gate prevents autonomous session start when confidence < 0.70
Tested full direction inference chain end-to-end with real git log and file state

next_actions.action: Commit uncommitted state files (implementation_state.md, notifications.log) with message 'askr: validate direction inference gate prevents empty-context sessions'
next_actions.why: Session work is complete; state must be persisted before next session can read it

next_actions.action: Document the 'nothing' threshold in lifecycle.py docstring: direction inference returns None or confidence < 0.70 when all three signals are empty/stale, triggering direction_confirm HITL gate
next_actions.why: User question about 'nothing' needs explicit definition in code for future maintainers and autonomous agents

next_actions.action: Add unit test for _infer_direction() with empty state (no dirty files, no blockers, no handover) to verify it returns confidence < 0.70
next_actions.why: Validates the gate logic prevents token waste on truly empty sessions

decisions.decision: Direction inference uses three independent signals (dirty files, blockers.md, handover) rather than single source
decisions.reason: Provides redundancy and prevents false negatives when one signal is stale or missing

decisions.decision: Confidence < 0.70 triggers HITL direction_confirm gate, not autonomous session start
decisions.reason: Prevents wasting tokens on sessions with insufficient context or direction

relational_files.why: Calls _infer_direction() to populate handover before session ends
Signal 3 source; next_actions field drives autonomous session direction
